tasks.notes: Created src/, src/activities/, src/models/, src/utils/, commands/, templates/, ci/, tests/ with __init__.py files. Created pyproject.toml. Ported logger.py, url_sanitizer.py, markdown_formatter.py to src/utils/. Verified: python -c 'import src' passes.

Ported review_models.py with all legacy models + new Finding, FixVerification, FindingsFile dataclasses. Created config.py stripping all OpenAI fields, keeping ADO auth + penalty matrix + star thresholds, added VCS (ado/github) and GH_TOKEN fields. Verified imports with PYTHONPATH=src.

Ported all 8 activities to src/activities/ with updated imports. Added cr-id extraction (_extract_cr_id) to FetchPRCommentsActivity and cr-id injection (<!-- cr-id: {cr_id} -->) to PostPRCommentActivity._post_line_comment. Updated UpdateSummaryActivity summary markers to use new SUMMARY_MARKER. All 8 activities import without errors.

Ported pr_scorer.py to src/pr_scorer.py, adapted calculate_pr_score to accept List[Finding]. Added apply_mode_multipliers: security/performance x2 (warning->critical), architecture x1.5 (suggestion->warning), migration elevates all to critical. Ported score_comparison.py to src/score_comparison.py, adapted to work with both new FixVerification[] and legacy FixVerificationResult. All verified.

pytest: no tests yet (0 collected, exit 5 — expected at Phase 1 stage). All imports resolve with PYTHONPATH=src. Config strips OpenAI, VCS+GH_TOKEN present. cr-id extraction and injection verified. Mode multipliers verified (security/performance warning->critical, migration all->critical). Pushed to origin.

Created src/vcs.py with argparse CLI and 6 subcommands: get-pr, list-threads, post-comment, resolve-thread, get-file, post-summary. All wrap corresponding activities. JSON to stdout, errors to stderr. Auth from env via Settings.

Created commands/findings-schema.json (JSON Schema draft-07 matching FindingsFile). Created src/post_findings.py (~380 lines): validates schema, filters <0.7 confidence, caps 30/5-per-file by severity, fetches existing cr-ids, deduplicates, scores with mode multipliers, posts comments (ADO activity, GitHub gh api), handles fix_verifications, reads .codereview.yml gate thresholds, posts summary, outputs structured JSON. --dry-run skips VCS writes. Logging redirected to stderr for clean JSON stdout.

Created tests/conftest.py (shared fixtures), tests/test_pr_scorer.py (18 tests: 0 findings=5 stars, security critical=5.0, mode multipliers), tests/test_post_findings.py (24 tests: confidence filter, cap, cr-id dedup, .codereview.yml thresholds, dry-run E2E), tests/test_vcs_cli.py (24 tests: subcommand parsing, activity invocation). All 66 tests passing.

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 2 — VCS CLI + Post Findings
tasks.notes: pytest: 66 passed, 0 failed. vcs.py --help: all 6 subcommands shown. post_findings.py --dry-run with tests/fixtures/sample_findings.json: valid JSON output, confidence filter drops cr-006 (0.60), security mode elevates cr-002 warning→critical, gate fails as expected. Pushed to origin.
